briefdescription.para: Node contains named child nodes.
Node contains one scalar value.
Node contains ordered child nodes.
JSON node kind used by the lightweight tree implementation.
Optional name/key of this node inside its parent.
Owned child nodes for objects and arrays.
Store the parent pointer used for tree navigation.
Parse one scalar JSON token from the input string.
Recursively serialize this node into the provided string buffer.
Append indentation spaces used by pretty JSON serialization.
Convert this node into a scalar value and remember quote handling.
Split a dotted JSON path and return the final element name.
Create an unnamed object node.
Create a named JSON value node initialized with text data.
Create a JSON node with an optional name and explicit node type.
Delete all child nodes on destruction.
Delete all child nodes and reset this node to an empty container.
Return true if a direct or dotted-path child exists.
Return the stored node type.
Return the parent node, or nullptr for a root node.
Return true when this node is a JSON object.
Return true when the named child exists and is an object.
Return true when this node is a JSON array.
Return true when the named child exists and is an array.
Return true when this node is a scalar JSON value.
Return true when the named child exists and is a scalar value.
Return true if this node contains a simple integer/float literal.
Return true if a named child contains a numeric literal.
Return true if this node contains a recognized boolean literal.
Return true if a named child contains a recognized boolean literal.
Find a child by name or dotted path.
Ensure that all object nodes before the final path element exist.
Create or replace a child value node.
Create or replace a child object node.
Create or replace a child array node.
Return an existing value element or create it on demand.
String overload for value element access.
Return this node's value as String, or the supplied default.
Return a named child value as String, or the supplied default.
Return this node's raw value text.
Return a named child value or, for value nodes, this node's value.
Return this node's value as C string, or the supplied default.
Return a named child value as C string, or the supplied default.
Parse a named child value as int.
Parse this node's numeric value as int.
Parse a named child value as unsigned int.
Parse this node's numeric value as unsigned int.
Parse a named child value as float.
Parse this node's numeric value as float.
Parse a named child value as long.
Parse this node's numeric value as long.
Parse a named child value as unsigned long.
Parse this node's numeric value as unsigned long.
Parse a named child value as bool.
Parse this node's boolean value.
Copy this node's text into the target string when present.
Copy this node's text unless it matches the excluded marker.
Copy a named child text value into the target string when present.
Copy a named child text value unless it matches the excluded marker.
Store this value in the target if it is numeric.
Store a named child in the target if it is numeric.
Store this value in the target if it is numeric.
Store a named child in the target if it is numeric.
Store this value in the target if it is numeric.
Store a named child in the target if it is numeric.
Store this value in the target if it is boolean.
Store a named child in the target if it is boolean.
Store this value in the target if it is numeric.
Store a named child in the target if it is numeric.
Return a named object node, optionally creating/converting it.
Return a named array node, optionally creating/converting it.
Return a named scalar value node, optionally creating/converting it.
Parse JSON text into this node tree.
Remove and delete the direct child with the given name.
Store a quoted string value in this node.
Store a quoted String value in this node.
Store an unquoted boolean value in this node.
Store an unquoted signed integer value in this node.
Store an unquoted unsigned integer value in this node.
Store an unquoted floating point value in this node.
Store an unquoted signed long value in this node.
Store an unquoted unsigned long value in this node.
Set or create a named string value.
Set or create a named String value.
Set or create a named boolean value.
Set or create a named signed integer value.
Set or create a named floating point value.
Set or create a named signed long value.
Set or create a named unsigned long value.
Print this node tree to Serial for diagnostics.
Create the common command/data/payload message structure.

simplesect.para: The payload object node so callers can fill it directly.

briefdescription.para: Serialize this node tree as compact JSON.
Serialize this node tree as pretty-printed JSON.
